data.title: DNO ASA to start oil exports through Iraq-Türkiye Pipeline on 27 September 2025 after agreements with Iraqi and Kurdistan governments.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, DNO ASA, a Norway-based oil and gas company, revealed plans to begin oil exports through the Iraq-Türkiye Pipeline on September 27, 2025. This follows recent agreements among the Federal Government of Iraq, the Kurdistan Regional Government, and several global oil firms. Stay tuned for updates on this significant development in the energy sector.

data.title: UnionPay's acceptance grows in Europe, available in over 90% of countries and regions. MADRID, Sept. 26, 2025.
data.description: Madrid witnessed a milestone on Sept. 26, 2025, as UnionPay International ("UPI") revealed noteworthy advancements towards establishing a unified payment system throughout Europe. UPI's services are now accessible in more than 90% of European countries and regions. This move aims to benefit both residents and visitors by offering a convenient payment solution.
Pharma and IT stocks lead broad-based decline in Indian equities.
Germany’s Merz backs using frozen Russian assets for Ukraine-ft
J.P. Morgan Trims Marathon Digital Price Target to $20 from $22

data.title: Addex Therapeutics to release 2025 H1 and Q2 financials on September 30, 2025. Conference call on October 1, 2025 at 16:00 CEST for investors, with CEO and Head of Translational Science presenting.
data.description: Geneva, Switzerland, September 26, 2025 - Addex Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company trading under SIX/NASDAQ as ADXN, specializing in developing innovative small molecule allosteric modulators for neurological conditions, has disclosed plans to unveil its financial status for Half-Year and Second Quarter 2025 on September 30, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for October 1, 2025, where CEO Tim Dyer and Head of Translational Science Mikhail Kalinichev will furnish insights into the company's progress and the Addex product pipeline. The teleconference and webcast targeting investors, analysts, and media will commence at 16:00 CEST (15:00 BST / 10:00 EDT / 07:00 PDT) on the aforementioned date.

data.title: Partnership between OSE Immunotherapeutics, Inserm Transfert, and Nantes University aims to accelerate innovation in immunotherapy.
data.description: A strategic partnership has been formed between OSE Immunotherapeutics, Inserm Transfert, and Nantes University to enhance innovation in the field of immunotherapy. This collaboration aims to expedite the development of new immunotherapies. With this partnership, significant advancements in the field are expected, with a focus on leveraging cutting-edge research and expertise. The collaboration brings together key players in the industry, combining the resources and knowledge of OSE Immunotherapeutics, Inserm Transfert, and Nantes University to drive progress in the immunotherapy sector. This partnership marks a milestone in the industry and is set to pave the way for groundbreaking discoveries.

data.title: Wereldhave partners with Ocean Outdoor for 150+ digital screens in 11 Dutch centers, expanding on existing collaboration.
data.description: A partnership agreement has been reached between Wereldhave and Ocean Outdoor Netherlands, where the latter will serve as the sole media partner for installing and managing more than 150 new digital advertising screens in 11 shopping and Full Service Centers within the Netherlands. This collaboration builds upon their prior work on expansive video walls, with Wereldhave choosing Ocean Outdoor due to its unique strategies and forward-thinking concepts.

data.title: HTTP 402 is revamped for digital payments, per Pantera Capital - a major change in online transaction management.
data.description: Pantera Capital has announced a groundbreaking development in online transactions, with the reimagining of HTTP 402 to streamline digital payments. This move signifies a major change in the way online transactions, particularly payment processes, are handled. This update is set to revolutionize the digital payment landscape by providing a more efficient and user-friendly experience.

data.title: OpenAI has introduced ChatGPT 'Pulse' for personalized daily updates, potentially assisting crypto traders.
data.description: OpenAI has introduced ChatGPT Pulse, a new service designed to provide personalized daily updates to users according to their preferences. This innovation is particularly beneficial for individuals involved in the world of cryptocurrency, offering tailored information to aid investors in staying informed.

data.title: Former Google exec Benjamin Habbel joins Tether as Chief Business Officer to drive global growth and portfolio expansion.
data.description: Benjamin Habbel has been appointed as the Chief Business Officer of Tether, a cryptocurrency stablecoin company. The former Google executive will be tasked with driving the company's worldwide expansion and enhancing its product portfolio. This move signals Tether's commitment to growth and development in the industry.

data.title: Envision and Fortescue partner to set new benchmark for renewable energy in Australia, expanding globally.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in New York City, the United Nations General Assembly witnessed an announcement from Fortescue, a major player in the iron ore industry, regarding their commitment to speeding up decarbonization efforts worldwide. Fortescue revealed the formation of a global alliance focused on quick and profitable decarbonization initiatives. This move is part of Fortescue's dedication to making a significant impact on a global scale, showing their leadership and commitment towards sustainability efforts.

data.title: Ant International launches AI SHIELD to enhance financial AI security. Proactive toolkit for secure AI-powered services.
data.description: Ant International has recently rolled out AI SHIELD, a new proactive toolkit designed to enhance the security and compliance of AI-driven financial services.
